name: Lexicographer Review (Patrick White, 2026-05-29)
short_description: Independent lexicographer review by Patrick White (Wordbox Language and Publishing Services Ltd) of 363 suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items, saved on 2026-05-29 via the marureview.com tool under the shared 'one sense by default' brief with a typed cannot_answer taxonomy.

authors.name: Patrick White
authors.institution: Wordbox Language and Publishing Services Ltd

institutions.name: Wordbox Language and Publishing Services Ltd

size_description: 363 verdicts on suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items (one JSON file with `saved_at`, `total_items`, `reviewed`, `verdicts`; each verdict carries `instance_id`, `chosen_sense_keys`, a typed `cannot_answer` list whose on-disk values are `__no_sense_applies__`, `__inventory_inadequate__`, `__input_defective__`, plus `cannot_answer_notes` and `comment`). 29 items carry a non-empty `cannot_answer` flag (11 `__no_sense_applies__`, 12 `__inventory_inadequate__`, 6 `__input_defective__`); 18 verdicts pick more than one sense. The annotation protocol is documented in the reviewer brief at https://marureview.com/brief, mirrored in `sources/reviews/protocols/marureview-brief-2026-05-26.md`.

files.description: Patrick White's 363 verdicts on suspicious Maru2022 ALL_NEW items, saved 2026-05-29 via the marureview.com tool
